type.description: The collector type to use for this entry

input.description: File path or simple glob pattern (e.g. packages/*/coverage-summary.json)

tags.description: Override tags for this entry's documents

category.description: Override category for this entry's documents

project.description: Override project name (otherwise auto-detected from nearest .csproj or package.json)

solution.description: Override solution name (otherwise auto-detected from .sln or workspace root package.json)

url.description: Override URL for lighthouse entries (otherwise extracted from report)
